endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyassignments
endpoints.description: Gets all the policy assignments for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policydefinitions
endpoints.description: Gets all the policy definitions for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policydefinitions/{policyDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policydefinitions/{policyDefinitionName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a policy definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policydefinitions/{policyDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policydefinitionname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets policy assignments for the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyassignments
endpoints.description: Gets policy assignments for a resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets a policy assignment by ID.
endpoints.description: When providing a scope for the assignment, use '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/' for subscriptions, '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group-name}' for resource groups, and '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group-name}/providers/{resource-provider-namespace}/{resource-type}/{resource-name}' for resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYASSIGNMENTID}} with a real policyassignmentid.

endpoints.name: Creates a policy assignment by ID.
endpoints.description: Policy assignments are inherited by child resources. For example, when you apply a policy to a resource group that policy is assigned to all resources in the group. When providing a scope for the assignment, use '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/' for subscriptions, '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group-name}' for resource groups, and '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group-name}/providers/{resource-provider-namespace}/{resource-type}/{resource-name}' for resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYASSIGNMENTID}} with a real policyassignmentid.

endpoints.name: Deletes a policy assignment by ID.
endpoints.description: When providing a scope for the assignment, use '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/' for subscriptions, '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group-name}' for resource groups, and '/subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group-name}/providers/{resource-provider-namespace}/{resource-type}/{resource-name}' for resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYASSIGNMENTID}} with a real policyassignmentid.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyassignments/{policyAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real policyassignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: Creates a policy assignment.
endpoints.description: Policy assignments are inherited by child resources. For example, when you apply a policy to a resource group that policy is assigned to all resources in the group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real policyassignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyassignments/{policyAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real policyassignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
